name: retrieval-missing-gap
expected: retrieval Challenge requires a known gap_id

name: retrieval-open-gap
expected: retrieval resolution conflicts with open Gap status

name: evidence-zero-match
expected: uniquely match one obtained same-Claim record

name: confirmed-retrieval-no-evidence
expected: retrieval resolution requires an Evidence reference

name: refuted-no-basis
expected: refuted Challenge requires Evidence or non-retrieval review notes

name: unresolved-unchanged
expected: unresolved Challenge requires downgraded or withdrawn confidence

name: high-organizer-close
expected: high Challenge must be closed by original reviewer

name: high-disputed-formal
expected: open or disputed high Challenge blocks formal report
